_comment: Source-currency registry (domain: florida-standards). The EXTERNAL counterpart to tools/registry-sources.json (which watches internal files): this lists authoritative WEB sources to monitor for freshness. tools/source_currency.py fetches each (conditional GET), classifies a freshness state (current/changed/superseded/removed_404/stale_age/unreachable/uncertain), and reports a stale-source list with a reason + recommended action. Standards/legal/program changes are ADVISORY + human-verified — never auto-applied, never fabricated. Seeded from shared/standards/resources/florida/sources.json watch_pages. After a human approves a change, run `source_currency.py --update-baselines --domain florida-standards` to record the new etag/last_modified/content_sha256.
authority_note: PRIMARY sources only count for a confirmed change (CPALMS, FLDOE, FL Legislature, FL Admin Code, WIDA, district boards). Secondary sources are discovery-only and route to gaps, never results.
